## Type

- [ ] Skill / reference content (requires SME review)
- [ ] Engineering / CI / security
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Plugin / IDE

## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated (`make test`)
- [ ] No real PHI/CHD in commits or examples
- [ ] If `references/` changed: provenance footer updated per [docs/sme-review.md](docs/sme-review.md)
- [ ] If dependencies changed: `requirements-lock.txt` regenerated (`make lock`)
